name: Zarok, the Void Caller
resistances: nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing (from stoneskin)

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: Zarok has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

spellcasting.header: Zarok is an 18th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 17, +9 to hit with spell attacks). He can cast shield and misty step at will. He has the following wizard spells prepared:

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: Zarok makes three attacks with his Arcane Burst.

actions.name: Arcane Burst
actions.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) force damage.

actions.name: Void Touch
actions.description: Melee Spell Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (3d6) necrotic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

bonus_actions.name: Misty Step
bonus_actions.description: Zarok briefly surrounds himself in silvery mist and teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space that he can see.

reactions.name: Shield
reactions.description: An invisible barrier of magical force appears and protects Zarok. Until the start of his next turn, he has a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack, and he takes no damage from magic missile.

reactions.name: Counterspell
reactions.description: Zarok attempts to interrupt a creature he can see that is casting a spell. If the creature is casting a spell of 3rd level or lower, its spell fails and has no effect.

legendary_actions.header: Zarok can take 3 legendary actions, choosing from the options below. Only one legendary action option can be used at a time and only at the end of another creature's turn. Zarok regains spent legendary actions at the start of his turn.

actions.name: Void Shift (Costs 2 Actions)
actions.description: Zarok moves up to his flying speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

actions.name: Disruptive Touch (Costs 3 Actions)
actions.description: Zarok makes one Void Touch attack. If it hits, the target also loses one of its lowest-level unexpended spell slots.
